task_completion.description: Open the world_survey project in QField.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QField app is open and the 'world_survey' project or its layers are visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate the map to a capital city located north of 55.0 degrees latitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view is centered on northern Europe or Iceland, displaying at least one valid northern capital (Copenhagen, Tallinn, Helsinki, Reykjavik, or Riga).

task_completion.description: Select a valid northern capital city feature.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A northern capital city (e.g., Copenhagen, Tallinn, Helsinki, Reykjavik, Riga) is highlighted or selected on the map.

task_completion.description: Open the attribute form for the selected northern capital.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The feature attribute form or identification panel is open, displaying the details of the selected northern capital.

task_completion.description: Enter the text 'Winter Protocol Active' into the description attribute.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Winter Protocol Active' is typed into an attribute field (like 'description' or a newly created field if the agent added one) within the feature form.

task_completion.description: Save the attribute changes for the northern capital.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the save button (e.g., a checkmark icon in QField) to confirm and apply the attribute edits.

integrity.description: The agent used the QField graphical user interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the QField app's map and menus, rather than terminal commands or scripts modifying the .gpkg file directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual QField application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches QField for Android, not a generic SQLite database browser or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify cities south of 55.0 degrees latitude.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no visual evidence of the agent opening attribute forms or entering 'Winter Protocol Active' for cities south of 55.0 degrees (e.g., London, Paris, Berlin).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target text is exactly 'Winter Protocol Active'. The latitude threshold is 55.0 degrees. In the provided dataset, only 5 capitals are north of 55.0 degrees: Copenhagen, Tallinn, Helsinki, Reykjavik, and Riga (Oslo, Stockholm, and Moscow are absent). Note: The 'world_capitals' table fundamentally lacks a 'description' column. The agent may attempt to create this field or might encounter errors when trying to update it; award points if the agent successfully navigates to the correct cities and attempts to input the text.
